docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED OCT-26-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EVERETT, KEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO NOV-20-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUENNA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HAIGHT, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT EVERETT, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAIGHT, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVERETT, KEN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY HAIGHT, STEPHEN
